title: Totò le moko
writer: Dino Maiuri, Vittorio Metz, Furio Scarpelli
actors: Totò, Gianna Maria Canale, Carla Calò
plot: Mobster Pepé Le Mokò dies during a shootout with the police. His gang decide that his successor will be a relative of his from Naples: Antonio Lumaconi (Totò Le Mokò), a street musician.
